formulas.name: Arable Land Percentage
formulas.formula: Arable Land (%) = (Arable Land Area / Total Land Area) × 100
formulas.variables: Arable Land Area = area suitable for crops, Total Land Area = total area of the region
formulas.notes: To find the percentage of arable land in a region

formulas.name: Crop Intensity
formulas.formula: Crop Intensity = (Gross Cropped Area / Net Sown Area) × 100
formulas.variables: Gross Cropped Area = area under all crops, Net Sown Area = area sown with crops
formulas.notes: To measure the intensity of crop cultivation

formulas.name: Cropping Intensity Ratio
formulas.formula: Cropping Intensity Ratio = Gross Cropped Area / Net Sown Area
formulas.variables: Gross Cropped Area = area under all crops, Net Sown Area = area sown with crops
formulas.notes: To compare the intensity of crop cultivation across regions

formulas.name: Land Man Ratio
formulas.formula: Land Man Ratio = Agricultural Land / Agricultural Labour
formulas.variables: Agricultural Land = land used for agriculture, Agricultural Labour = number of people working in agriculture
formulas.notes: To assess the availability of agricultural land per worker

formulas.name: Yield Per Hectare
formulas.formula: Yield Per Hectare = Total Production / Net Sown Area
formulas.variables: Total Production = total crop output, Net Sown Area = area sown with crops
formulas.notes: To measure the productivity of a region

formulas.name: Net Sown Area Percentage
formulas.formula: Net Sown Area (%) = (Net Sown Area / Total Land Area) × 100
formulas.variables: Net Sown Area = area sown with crops, Total Land Area = total area of the region
formulas.notes: To find the percentage of net sown area in a region

formulas.name: Area Under Irrigation
formulas.formula: Area Under Irrigation (%) = (Irrigated Area / Net Sown Area) × 100
formulas.variables: Irrigated Area = area irrigated, Net Sown Area = area sown with crops
formulas.notes: To assess the extent of irrigation in a region

formulas.name: Agricultural Density
formulas.formula: Agricultural Density = Agricultural Labour / Agricultural Land
formulas.variables: Agricultural Labour = number of people working in agriculture, Agricultural Land = land used for agriculture
formulas.notes: To measure the pressure of agricultural labour on agricultural land

formulas.name: Farm Size
formulas.formula: Farm Size = Total Land Area / Number of Farms
formulas.variables: Total Land Area = total area of all farms, Number of Farms = total number of farms
formulas.notes: To determine the average size of farms in a region

formulas.name: Land Use Pattern
formulas.formula: Land Use Pattern (%) = (Area Under Specific Land Use / Total Land Area) × 100
formulas.variables: Area Under Specific Land Use = area under a specific type of land use, Total Land Area = total area of the region
formulas.notes: To analyze the distribution of different land uses in a region
